sign_in_prompt: Sign in to manage your WhatsApp campaigns, monitor performance, and stay connected with your customers in one unified inbox.
form_title: Enter your credentials to access your dashboard.
form_subtitle: Sign in to continue to your account.
forgot_password_description: No worries! Enter your email address and we'll send you a code to reset your password.
verify_email_description: We sent a 6-digit verification code to
verification_code_description: Enter the 6-digit code sent to your email
password_requirement: Password must be at least 8 characters long
error_missing_credentials: Please enter both email and password
error_robot_check: Please verify that you are not a robot
error_invalid_credentials: Invalid email or password. Please try again.
error_account_inactive: Your account is inactive. Please contact support to activate your account.
error_not_agent: Access denied. This portal is restricted to agent accounts only.
error_account_locked: Your account has been locked due to multiple failed login attempts. Please try again later or contact support.
error_rate_limit: Too many login attempts. Please wait a few minutes and try again.
error_network: Network error. Please check your connection and try again.
error_server: Server error. Please try again later.
error_passkey_cancelled: Passkey sign-in was cancelled or timed out
